cross_scene_arcs.title: From Mechanic to Moral Leader
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Call evolves from a competent technician focused on immediate safety to a decisive leader committed to preventing the alien threat, culminating in her taking full control of the ship's systems to enforce a moral imperative.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: maintain crew safety and equipment integrity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the group remains divided, with some members prioritizing personal survival over stopping the threat

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Alien Within
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Call shifts from attempting to eliminate Ripley as a threat to understanding the alien's presence within her, leading to a broader realization that the danger is systemic and must be contained at all costs.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: to kill Ripley to prevent alien release
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: understands the alien is not contained and is actively present within Ripley
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Ripley is a threat or potential ally

cross_scene_arcs.title: Synthetic Identity and Acceptance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Call's discomfort with machines foreshadows her own synthetic nature, which is later exposed, leading to rejection and vulnerability before ultimately being integrated into her role as a savior and survivor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: expresses internal conflict about working with dangerous machinery
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: on Earth, no longer under immediate threat
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: chemical burns from alien blood and acute psychological distress

cross_scene_arcs.title: Call and Ripley: From Adversaries to Allies
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Call's relationship with Ripley evolves from assassination intent to reluctant understanding, then mutual reliance in combat, and finally a quiet bond of shared survival and fugitive status.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: equal partnership affirmed with Ripley through shared silence and drink
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: uncertain future on an unfamiliar planet

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Trauma and Emergence as Hybrid
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley progresses from a traumatized clone recovering from forced surgery to a physically transformed hybrid, increasingly aware of her altered body and violent capabilities.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: traumatized and disoriented after violent dream and self-harm
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally shattered after destroying her clone predecessors and confronting her hybrid identity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how she will reconcile her humanity with her alien traits and artificial origins

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Subject to Threat: Resistance Against Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley shifts from passive medical subject to active resistor, defying Wren and the facility's authority through physical rebellion and destruction of the cloning program.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: under medical control, newly extracted from alien embryo
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: destroys failed clones and turns against her creators
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her actions are reactive rather than strategic, leaving her long-term agency uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Knowledge and Authority on the Alien Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley asserts unmatched understanding of the alien lifecycle, using her experience to warn, identify threats, and guide survival decisions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: attempting to convince Wren and Gediman of the queen's danger
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as the sole authority on xenomorph biology and behavior
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her warnings are often met with skepticism or silence, limiting her influence

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolution of Trust with Call
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley's relationship with Call evolves from wary detachment to life-saving trust and emotional connection, despite revelations of Call's synthetic nature.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: gives Call the alien's tongue, creating a tentative bond
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: shares a quiet, vulnerable moment with Call after surviving together
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: long-term trust remains uncertain due to Call's hidden identity and potential undisclosed programming

cross_scene_arcs.title: Survival and Escape from Confinement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ripley transitions from captive to active survivor, breaking free, fighting through threats, and escaping the facility with Call.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: bound and submerged in waste pool
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: off-grid and safe on an unfamiliar planet with Call
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: no clear plan for the future or long-term safety

cross_scene_arcs.title: Survival Through Resourcefulness
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vriess repeatedly avoids injury and adapts to danger by relying on quick thinking and concealed tools, evolving from narrowly escaping sabotage to arming himself and others.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Working under threat and nearly injured by Johner's actions
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Actively equipping the group with hidden weapons from his chair
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing risk of sabotage or environmental hazards

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defiance and Dignity Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vriess asserts autonomy despite physical disability and military authority, transitioning from sarcastic resistance to physical dependence while maintaining agency.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Challenging military personnel to inspect his wheelchair
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Being carried by Christie while still contributing tactically
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Physical vulnerability and emotional toll of losing Christie

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Isolation to Tactical Leadership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vriess moves from being abandoned during a crisis to playing key technical and tactical roles, including arming the group, luring aliens, and directing ship reactivation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Left behind and forced to escape alone
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Leading critical operations during escape and crash landing
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Lack of tools to bypass obstructions without Call's interface

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Alliance with Call
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vriess shifts from arming Call to relying on her technical skills, culminating in mutual recognition as fugitives who must stay off-grid.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Distributing weapons to Call and asserting functional expectations
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Aligning with Call to avoid authorities and disappear on Earth
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Uncertain future and potential for official pursuit

cross_scene_arcs.title: Loss and Emotional Burden
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vriess experiences the death of Christie, a close ally, and struggles to accept the loss while physically carrying the body during escape.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Reuniting with Christie and referencing shared history
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotionally shattered after being forced to release Christie's body
